title: PRIMARY MEDICAL CARE SERVICES - 211info
text: NHC TANASBOURNE MEDICAL & DENTAL CLINIC PRIMARY MEDICAL CARE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides primary care services that include care for acute and chronic illnesses, annual exams for children and adults, immunizations, mental health screenings, alcohol and drug assessments, and health education. Reproductive health services include STI/STD testing and treatment, pregnancy testing, and Pap tests. Offers assistance applying for Medicaid (OHP) and private insurance through the Federal Health Exchange. 10690 NE Cornell Road Suite 220 Hillsboro, OR 97124 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm (503) 848-5861 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 848-5861 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP (Trillium, CareOregon, Yamhill, and Open Card), Medicare, and most private insurances. Sliding scale fee available. No insurance $25 down payment for first visit. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. If applying for sliding scale fees, bring one of the following: -Last 2 pay stubs -Previous year's tax return -Unemployment statement LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, other language interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Washington and Clackamas Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus line 48 stops on NE Cornell Road and bus 52 stops on 185th Services: Assessment for Substance Use Disorders Childhood Immunization Community Clinics General Medical Care Mental Health Evaluation Navigator Programs Pap Tests Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Sexually Transmitted Infection Treatment Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC HUMAN REPRODUCTION - PRENATAL CARE SPECIALTY MEDICINE - GENERAL DENTAL CARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NHC TANASBOURNE MEDICAL & DENTAL CLINIC
